business.name: GreenLeaf Lawn & Landscape
business.tagline: Affordable lawn care & landscaping, done right
business.oneLineDescription: Reliable, affordable lawn care and landscaping across Austin — maintenance, cleanups, irrigation, hardscape, design and build. Free estimates, upfront pricing.

urgency.banner: Free estimates · Booking spring cleanups now — limited spots this month
urgency.hero: Only a few maintenance openings left this month

hero.imageAlt: Real job photo: freshly mowed front lawn with crisp edges at an Austin home
hero.headline: A greener yard, without the hassle
hero.subhead: Reliable lawn care and landscaping across Austin — clear pricing, friendly crews, and a free estimate within one business day.

services.name: Lawn & Landscape Maintenance
services.description: Weekly or biweekly mowing, edging, and cleanup that keeps your yard sharp all season.

services.name: Seasonal Cleanups
services.description: Spring and fall resets — leaves, debris, cutbacks, and fresh mulch so the yard starts strong.

gallery.alt: Real job photo: fresh dark mulch in a bed
gallery.caption: Fresh mulch

gallery.alt: Real job photo: cleared leaves along a fence line

services.name: Sprinkler & Irrigation
services.description: Repairs, tune-ups, and smart-controller upgrades that cut your water bill and keep every zone green.

gallery.caption: Smart controller

gallery.alt: Real job photo: sprinkler head watering a zone at dusk
gallery.caption: Even coverage

services.name: Hardscape & Patios
services.description: Paver patios, walkways, and retaining walls built to last — usable outdoor space on a real budget.

services.name: Landscape Design
services.description: A clear, affordable plan — plants, layout, and budget — so you know exactly what you're getting.

gallery.caption: Planted design

services.name: Landscape Construction
services.description: Full installs — beds, sod, plants, edging, and lighting — turning a plan into a finished yard.

plans.name: Basic
plans.blurb: Biweekly mow & tidy for a hands-off yard.

plans.name: Full Care
plans.blurb: Weekly service plus beds — our most popular plan.

plans.name: Premium
plans.blurb: Full-service care with irrigation and fertilization.

customQuote.title: Bigger project?
customQuote.blurb: Patios, irrigation, design, or a full install — get a fast, itemized custom quote with no obligation.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Booked online, got a quote the next morning, and my yard has never looked better. Fair price and they actually show up when they say.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.text: The Full Care plan is worth every penny. Weekly crew is friendly and thorough, and the beds look amazing.

reviews.name: The Alvarez family
reviews.text: They turned our dead lawn into a low-water landscape we love. Clear pricing, no upsell, done in a few days.

reviews.name: Dana R.
reviews.text: Fixed three broken sprinkler heads and set up a smart controller. Water bill already dropped. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Kevin M.
reviews.text: New paver patio came out better than we pictured. On time, on budget, cleaned up every day.

reviews.name: Sofia L.
reviews.text: Reliable, affordable, and easy to reach. Been with GreenLeaf for two seasons and won't switch.

areas.blurb: Full lawn care and landscaping across central Austin and the suburbs.
